name: Marshmallow Crispies
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a large saucepan with cooking oil.
2. Add marshmallows and melt over low heat, stirring occasionally.
3. Quickly stir in cereal; mix well.
4. Press mixture into the greased 8 inch square pan.
5. Cut into 25 squares.
1 square = 60 calories, 1 fruit exchange, 15 grams carbohydrate, trace protein, trace fat, 39 mg sodium
Adapted from Exchanges for All Occasions by Marion J. Franz, Third Edition 1993.
